message:
fix: add missing CompatRuntime import and feature-gate vendored MuxPoolPayload

wezterm.rs: run_async_test_paused() called runtime.block_on() without
importing the CompatRuntime trait (unlike run_async_test() which did).

unified_telemetry.rs: MuxPoolPayload and SubsystemPayload::MuxPool
referenced crate::vendored::mux_pool which is gated behind the
"vendored" feature — gate the struct and enum variant accordingly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
